narrative:
Newton Twp Only township has 2,669 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
